channel.title: Enterprise Cloud on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise Cloud on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Per-user budgets for cost centers in the billing UI
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Cloud now supports creating per-user budgets for cost centers directly in the billing UI. Enterprise admins can manage these user-level budgets alongside cost centers and budgets in one place.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot agent session streaming is now in public preview
item.description:
GitHub has put Copilot agent session streaming into public preview for Enterprise Cloud customers with enterprise managed users. Session data is available across Copilot clients, including cloud agents on github.com and data-resident deployments.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Issue fields are now in public preview for all organizations
item.description:
GitHub has made issue fields available in public preview for all organizations on github.com and GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency. The feature lets teams define typed metadata on issues, such as Priority and Effort.

  • Source: GitHub
